title: cyanea superba subsp. superba
intro: Cyanea superba subsp. superba is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, native to the island of Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyanea superba subsp. superba include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In traditional Hawaiian herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
